blended.narrative: Mont-Tremblant is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours with little to no accumulation. Looking ahead, 22 inches possible over the next 14 days. Mild temps with highs near 48°F.

daily_summary.narrative: Today: light rain showers, highs of 48°F.
Tomorrow: light rain showers, highs of 50°F.
Wednesday: 6" of snow, highs of 39°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Thursday: 4" of snow, highs of 33°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Saturday: 2.5" of snow, highs of 28°F. Expect variable conditions.
Monday: 8" of heavy snow, highs of 25°F. Expect powder.
